trades.reasoning: All four bullish signals align (RSI 68.9, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20) confirming strong institutional momentum.
Full bullish signal confirmation with RSI 64.5 in the healthy momentum zone, adding semiconductor equipment exposure distinct from existing holdings.

decisions.briefing: Markets were broadly risk-on today with NASDAQ +1.4% and S&P 500 +0.9%. With $877 in cash and 4 open slots, we deployed into NBIS and ACMR, both showing full multi-signal bullish confirmation (RSI, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20).

market_education.summary_en: Both major indices advanced today, with the NASDAQ outpacing the S&P 500, suggesting continued investor appetite for growth and technology names. Broad-based buying across momentum names indicates risk appetite remains healthy. No single catalyst dominated; the move looks like a continuation of the recent risk-on trend.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤普遍上揚，納斯達克指數漲幅超越標普500指數，顯示投資人對科技與成長股的胃口依然強勁。動能股普遍獲得資金追捧，反映市場風險偏好持續健康。今日並無單一明顯的市場催化劑，這波漲勢看起來是近期風險偏好升溫趨勢的延續。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum confirmation means waiting for multiple technical signals — like RSI in a bullish range, a MACD crossover, and price above its moving average — to all line up before buying, rather than acting on just one signal. This reduces the chance of chasing a false or short-lived move.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能確認是指在買入前，等待多個技術訊號同時出現，例如RSI處於偏多區間、MACD黃金交叉、股價站上均線等，而不是只憑單一訊號就進場。這樣可以降低追高到假訊號或曇花一現行情的風險。
